get.summary: Receive all groups.
Receive all groups to which the user belongs (today).
Receive all functions (and user+scheduler information) which are configured to this group.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: DateTime Date for getting the right users available at that day

get.summary: Receive all days (from today) for which this group has not enough users available.

Receive days (from today) with a value for every day, which indicates the remainder of shortage of users in this group.
Positive is enough, negative is to short, 0 = exact enough.

get.summary: Receive user scheduler information, all unavailable appointments.

post.summary:
Update user scheduler available appointment hours for one day.
Max. 3 appointments each day.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: TimeSpan from time (only whole quarter of hours)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: TimeSpan to time (only whole quarter of hours)

delete.summary:
Update user scheduler not available appointment hours for one day.
Max. 3 appointments each day.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: TimeSpan from time (only quarter of whole hours)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: TimeSpan to time (only quarter of whole hours)

post.summary:
Update user scheduler appointments periodically for many days.
Max. 3 appointments each day.

parameters.name: weekDays
parameters.description: byte bit array, 1 = monday, 2 = tuesday, 4 = wednesday etc.

parameters.name: weekly
parameters.description: byte 1=every week, 2 = this week, following week not etc.

parameters.name: cleanDayFirst
parameters.description: bool Day completly available accept new from to moments

get.summary: Get the current shift appointments

post.summary: Update the current stored shift appointments in database
Set the current saved shift appointments in the user calendar

get.summary:
Receive user and group information.
When NotAvailable is true, user is not available for alarm come up.
When NoOccupancy is true, there are not enough people for a minimum group occupancy.

Receive menu for this user
if nodeID is empty, returns homenode menu
Receive user scheduler information, all unavailable appointments.

post.summary:
Update user scheduler available appointment hours for one day.
Max. 3 appointments each day.

delete.summary:
Update user scheduler not available appointment hours for one day.
Max. 3 appointments each day.

post.summary:
Update user scheduler appointments periodically for many days.
Max. 3 appointments each day.

parameters.description: byte 1=every week, 2 = this week, following week not etc.

parameters.name: cleanDayFirst
parameters.description: bool Day completly available accept new from to moments
